name: Obscene Ripple Wave Enchantment
descrip: Cast a charm on your opponent.
outcome: While you're submersed in their veritable sea of goo, the Perpetuas let out a perversely playful laugh as they send reverberating pulses of dark magic cascading across their amorphous body, the rippling waves shivering through your senses as every bit of your body in contact with the sinful slime is flooded with oozing syrupy pleasure.|n|An involuntary moan escapes your mouth at the heavy euphoria that drags you deeper into them, your thoughts melting away in the indulgent massaging ecstasy spreading all over you like an inescapable temptation to just lie there and let yourself sink into depravity.
miss: While you're submersed in their veritable sea of goo, the Perpetuas let out a perversely playful laugh as they send reverberating pulses of dark magic cascading across their amorphous body, but you somehow manage to resist the sinful spell!
statusOutcome: The magically-charged gooey caresses wash over you again and again in a pulsing rippling loop until you can't stop a slack pleasure-drunk smile from settling on your charmed-senseless face...
